mapper.sql: id, product_id, seller_id, buyer_id, price, status, meeting_time, meeting_location, create_time, complete_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction (product_id, seller_id, buyer_id, price, status, meeting_time, meeting_location) VALUES (#{productId}, #{sellerId}, #{buyerId}, #{price}, #{status}, #{meetingTime}, #{meetingLocation})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM transaction WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM transaction WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = #{status} LIMIT 1
